name: Enabling Local Network Access in Google Chrome for Retail Express POS
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When using "}, {"text": "Retail Express POS", "bold": true}, {"text": " through Google Chrome, your browser may block local devices (such as receipt printers or integrated EFTPOS terminals) by default."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
To ensure proper hardware communication, you must "}, {"text": "enable Local Network Access", "bold": true}, {"text": " for the Retail Express domain."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "🔹 Option 1: Enable via Site Settings (Recommended)"}], "data-id": "option-1-enable-via-site-settings-recommended"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use the steps below with reference to the screenshots provided."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Step 1 - Open Site Settings", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "While logged into POS, click the "}, {"text": "lock icon", "bold": true}, {"text": " next to the website address (see image below)."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ISFUP2EU788E/image.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ISFUP2EU788E/image.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image.png", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Site settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/GUCQ0HZSVV37/image.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/GUCQ0HZSVV37/image.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image.png", "width": 1159, "height": 850}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3. In the Settings tab that opens, scroll down to the "}, {"text": "Privacy and Security", "bold": true}, {"text": " section."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
4. Find "}, {"text": "Local network access", "bold": true}, {"text": " and change it to "}, {"text": "Allow", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Y4R4NYTXFR83/image.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Y4R4NYTXFR83/image.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image.png", "width": 1032, "height": 721}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "That's it! Your POS should now communicate correctly with your local receipt printer and EFTPOS devices."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "🔹 Option 2: Enable Manually Through Chrome Settings"}], "data-id": "option-2-enable-manually-through-chrome-settings"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you prefer to set this manually:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open Chrome and click the "}, {"text": "three vertical dots", "bold": true}, {"text": " (⋮) in the top-right corner."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to "}, {"text": "Privacy and security → Site settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll to "}, {"text": "Permissions → Additional permissions", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Local network access", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Next to "}, {"text": ""Allowed to connect to any device on your local network"", "bold": true}, {"text": ", click "}, {"text": "Add", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "pos.retailexpress.com.au"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Add", "bold": true}, {"text": " to confirm."}]}]}]}]
